parameters.query: SELECT valor FROM configuracion_general WHERE clave = 'ambiente'

WITH reserva_por_prereserva AS (
  SELECT id_pre_reserva, MIN(id_reserva) AS id_reserva
  FROM reservas
  WHERE id_pre_reserva IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY id_pre_reserva
),
pagos_periodo AS (
  SELECT p.id_pago, p.tipo, p.medio_pago, p.monto_recibido, p.created_at, p.validado_en,
         COALESCE(p.id_reserva, rpp.id_reserva) AS id_reserva
  FROM pagos p
  LEFT JOIN reserva_por_prereserva rpp ON rpp.id_pre_reserva = p.id_prereserva
  WHERE p.estado = 'confirmado'
    AND p.tipo IN ('sena','saldo','extra','ajuste','reembolso')
    -- FLOOR DURO (D-NEG-02): nunca antes de 2026-07-01, aunque periodo_desde venga menor.
    AND p.created_at >= GREATEST(DATE '2026-07-01', (($1::jsonb)->>'periodo_desde')::date)
    -- periodo_hasta INCLUSIVO: half-open al dia siguiente.
    AND p.created_at <  ((($1::jsonb)->>'periodo_hasta')::date + 1)
)
SELECT
  pp.id_pago,
  pp.id_reserva,
  c.nombre AS cabana,
  pp.tipo,
  pp.medio_pago,
  pp.monto_recibido,
  -- mes: criterio Carril B vigente sobre created_at, sin conversion adicional (sin AT TIME ZONE).
  to_char(date_trunc('month', pp.created_at), 'YYYY-MM') AS mes,
  pp.created_at,
  pp.validado_en
FROM pagos_periodo pp
LEFT JOIN reservas r ON r.id_reserva = pp.id_reserva
LEFT JOIN cabanas  c ON c.id_cabana  = r.id_cabana
ORDER BY pp.created_at, pp.id_pago;
